title: Add QuotaScope enum, replace Quota.scope: String
description: Quota.scope in methods/quota.rs is a String. RFC 8620 §6.2 defines quota scopes as 'account', 'domain', 'global'. An enum QuotaScope { Account, Domain, Global, Unknown(String) } with the Unknown catch-all would type this field correctly.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
